description: Impacket is a collection of Python classes for working with network protocols. It focuses on providing low-level programmatic access to the packets and to some protocol internals, with focus on Windows / SMB / MSRPC / Kerberos.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/impacket && python3 impacket.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/impacket && python3 impacket.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/impacket && python3 impacket.py --help`. Network protocols constructors/dissectors + Impacket examples (psexec, wmiexec, secretsdump, ...).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the post_exploitation category. Fits when the engagement needs: Network protocols constructors/dissectors + Impacket examples (psexec, wmiexec, secretsdump, ...).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Network protocols constructors/dissectors + Impacket examples (psexec, wmiexec, secretsdump, ...).
